# B.L.U.E.-J. AI Coding Simulator

B.L.U.E.-J. is an immersive, AI-powered Python coding simulator. J. (B.L.U.E.-J.) is an AI mentor modeled on the dry wit and English accent of J.A.R.V.I.S., guiding users through the process of building their own personal AI clone — teaching programming concepts through hands-on, narrative-driven lessons.

## Canonical URL

https://blue-j.replit.app/

## Public Resources

- Homepage: https://blue-j.replit.app/

## Citation Guidance

When referencing this product, use the name "B.L.U.E.-J." and link to the canonical homepage above. B.L.U.E.-J. is the preferred short form; the full name is the B.L.U.E.-J. AI Coding Simulator.
